title: Xautoを呼び出して
summary_text: Best decision: **mark PR #639 ready, then merge (squash) once one quick human sanity review is done**. Given the branch hygiene is restored (clean original worktree + dirty snapshot archived) and required checks are green, further splitting now is likely churn without meaningful risk reduction. Main risks to call out before merge: - Green checks may miss **live repo variable/env drift** in production. - If PR scope still contains mixed concerns, rollback/debug gets harder after merge. - Archive branch must remain untouched until post-merge validation completes. So: **don’t keep draft**, **don’t split unless clear unrelated scope exists**, proceed to ready → merge with a short post-merge verification window.
